items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate a specific scenario involving IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) on booking IDs. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or endpoints related to the implementation or testing of IDOR vulnerabilities. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status due to a lack of concrete evidence.
